pub OutputFormat::Png

pub struct QuantizeConfig
pub fn QuantizeConfig::new(OutputFormat) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_compute_quality_metric(self, bool) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_kmeans_sample_cap(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_max_colors(self, u32) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_min_ssim2(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_quality(self, Quality) -> Self
pub fn QuantizeConfig::with_target_ssim2(self, f32) -> Self
pub struct QuantizeResult
pub fn QuantizeResult::alpha_table(&self) -> core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn QuantizeResult::butteraugli_estimate(&self) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub fn QuantizeResult::indices(&self) -> &[u8]
pub fn QuantizeResult::mpe_result(&self) -> core::option::Option<&metric::MpeResult>
pub fn QuantizeResult::mpe_score(&self) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub fn QuantizeResult::palette(&self) -> &[[u8; 3]]
pub fn QuantizeResult::palette_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn QuantizeResult::palette_rgba(&self) -> &[[u8; 4]]
pub fn QuantizeResult::remap(&self, &[rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>], usize, usize, &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
pub fn QuantizeResult::remap_rgba(&self, &[rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>], usize, usize, &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
pub fn QuantizeResult::ssimulacra2_estimate(&self) -> core::option::Option<f32>
pub fn QuantizeResult::transparent_index(&self) -> core::option::Option<u8>
pub fn build_palette(&[imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>>], &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
pub fn build_palette_rgba(&[imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>>], &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
pub fn quantize(&[rgb::formats::rgb::Rgb<u8>], usize, usize, &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
pub fn quantize_rgba(&[rgb::formats::rgba::Rgba<u8>], usize, usize, &QuantizeConfig) -> core::result::Result<QuantizeResult, error::QuantizeError>
